name: Python Learn 2026
postCreateCommand: echo '--- STARTING POST-CREATE CONFIGURATION ---' && python3 -m ensurepip --upgrade && echo '--- UPGRADING PIP ---' && python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip && echo '--- INSTALLING FROM REQUIREMENTS.TXT ---' && python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '--- ALL DONE! READY TO CODE ---'
